headlines.description: — James Harden scored 21 points to become the ninth player in NBA history with more than 29,000 career points, Keon Ellis added 19 off the bench, and the Cleveland Cavaliers cruised to a 115-101 victory over the short-handed Philadelphia 76ers on...
headlines.shortLinkText: James Harden scores 21, joins 29,000-point club in Cavaliers' 115-101 win over 76ers

headlines.description: — Day'Ron Sharpe matched a season high with 19 points, Ochai Agbaji added 18 and the Brooklyn Nets beat the injury-plagued Memphis Grizzlies 126-115 on Monday night for their second straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sharpe and Agbaji lead Nets to 2nd straight win, 126-115 over injury-plagued Grizzlies

headlines.description: — Brice Sensabaugh scored 21 points, two-way player Blake Hinson made the go-ahead 3-pointer in the final minute, and the depleted Utah Jazz outlasted the ailing Golden State Warriors 119-116 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sensabaugh scores 21, Hinson makes go-ahead 3 as depleted Jazz stun Warriors, 119-116

events.name: New York Knicks at LA Clippers

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard scored 29 points, Bennedict Mathurin added 28 points, and the Los Angeles Clippers beat the New York Knicks 126-118 on Monday night to climb back to .500 for the first time since early November.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leonard powers the Clippers past the Knicks to reach .500 for the first time since November
